Perf Check: Deal cards lazy-load; LCP < 2.5s; images WebP; no CLS
SEO Check: Title: Today's Deals - CloudBasket; meta desc; H1; OG; Sitemap; paginated canonicals
A11y Check: Deal cards accessible; category tabs keyboard nav; filters ARIA labeled
Security Check: Deal data server-verified; affiliate IDs protected; no client-side price manipulation
Content Check: Deals current and not expired; prices correct; affiliate links working; expiry timestamps shown
Functional Check: Category filter works; deal click fires tracking; Buy Now opens affiliate; Flash Deals link navigates
Notes: Check if /deals and /best-deals have duplicate content — canonical one or 301 redirect

Perf Check: Countdown timer no CLS; deal images lazy WebP; fast load — flash sales are time-sensitive
SEO Check: Title: Flash Deals - CloudBasket; meta desc; H1; noindex if empty; OG with urgency
A11y Check: Countdown ARIA live region; screen reader announces time remaining; keyboard nav
Security Check: Deal data server-side only; countdown not manipulable client-side; affiliate IDs validated
Content Check: All deals active at page load; prices correct; expiry timestamps accurate; sold-out state handled
Functional Check: Countdown counts down correctly; sold-out state renders; deal click fires tracking; refresh updates deals
Notes: Test sold-out state; test page behavior when no flash deals exist — show empty state not crash

Perf Check: LCP (deal image) < 2.5s; countdown timer no CLS; fast server render
SEO Check: Schema:Offer+Product; title: [Deal Name] - Limited Time; canonical per deal; OG=deal image
A11y Check: Deal image alt; countdown readable by screen reader; Buy CTA ARIA labeled
Security Check: deal ID validated server-side; price server-rendered only; affiliate ID not exposed in client
Content Check: Deal details accurate; price + original price shown; expiry shown; affiliate disclosure; terms if applicable
Functional Check: Deal data loads; countdown works; Buy CTA fires tracking then redirects; expired deal shows graceful error
Notes: ⚠️ Check generateStaticParams(); handle gracefully if deal ID is invalid or expired — no crash
